title: OrchestKit CC support window (single source of truth)
description: Schema for shared/cc-support.json. Resolves the previously-dangling ./cc-support.schema.json $ref. Authored from the documented contract, NOT a single snapshot: latest_known MAY diverge below latest while a manual_override freezes the floor, and MAY converge in steady state — both are valid.

latest_known.description: Highest CC version ork's adoption is known to cover. Distinct from `latest` — may sit BELOW it while a manual_override freezes the floor.

policy.description: Steady-state window policy, e.g. 'latest + 3 previous minors'.

expires.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) after which the auto-bump policy resumes.
